chunks.content:
| 1 · File Processing                    | Q · User Query Input                  |
| -------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| Docling · RapidOCR · Groq vision       | Raw question + ACL check              |
| PDF · DOCX · PPTX · CSV · TXT · IMG    | Rephrase via Groq LLM                 |
| 2 · Cleaning & Normalization           |                                       |
| Remove noise · normalize text          | 6 · Hybrid Retrieval                  |
| Merge sentences · strip bullets        | vector store                          |
| 3 · Chunking                           | Dense (BGE-M3) + Sparse (BM25)        |
| Structural → sentence → mini-chunks    | RRF fusion → top-K candidates         |
| 4 · Embedding                          | 7 · Cross-Encoder Reranker            |
| BGE-M3 · dense + sparse vectors        | BGE-reranker (local · free)           |
| 1024-dim · multilingual                | Scores & reorders top-K               |
| 5 · Indexing                           | 8 · LLM as a Judge                    |
| Qdrant · cosine similarity             | Groq Llama-4-Scout                    |
| Metadata: filename · type · ACL        | Relevance eval · pass / reject        |
| ACL · PostgreSQL                       | 9 · Answer Generation                 |
| User roles · document permissions      | Qwen2.5-7B · inject validated context |
|                                        | Generate final answer                 |
|                                        | 10 · Hybrid Memory                    |
| Short: sliding window · Mid: summaries |                                       |
| Long-term: Qdrant vector store         |                                       |

Docling         BGE-M3        Qdrant        Groq LLM             PostgreSQL parsing         embedding     vector DB     judge + rephrase     ACL / permissions Best practice:  Cross-encoder reranker runs locally before LLM judge → saves tokens · improves precision · reduces latency RAG Pipeline Architecture · PFE 2026
